mnemonics: LIFO Lunch: Last In, First Out. The last person to join the lunch line is the first one served if the stack is implemented.
keyPoints: A stack pointer (top) tracks the index of the last inserted element.
Push operations add an element and increment the top pointer.
Pop operations remove the element at the top pointer and then decrement it.
commonMistakes: Attempting to pop an element from an empty stack (stack underflow).
Attempting to push an element onto a full stack (stack overflow) without checking the array bounds.
